# Lunyco - Alejandro Cortes Portfolio

## Overview
Personal portfolio website showcasing full-stack development projects, AI engineering work, and technical blog posts.

## Author
- Name: Alejandro Cortes
- Role: Full-Stack Engineer & AI Enthusiast
- Email: ale@lunyco.com
- Website: https://lunyco.com

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4
- Backend Experience: Django, Django REST Framework, Node.js
- Databases: PostgreSQL
- Cloud: AWS (Amplify, RDS, AppRunner, Secrets Manager)
- Testing: Cypress, Playwright, Jest
- AI/ML: RAG, Embeddings, LangChain (in progress)

## Work Experience
- The SilverLogic - Full-Stack & Automation Engineer (2024-Present)
- Freelance - Full-Stack Engineer (2023-Present)
- Xoom/PayPal - Senior QA Automation (2020-2024)
- Zuntex - Lead Software Engineer (2019-2020)

## Skills
TypeScript, Next.js, React, Django, DRF, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, CI/CD, Cypress, Playwright, Jest, Tailwind CSS, RAG/Embeddings

## Featured Projects

### Baxzar Platform
Full-stack e-commerce solution featuring user authentication, product management, shopping cart, and Stripe payment integration. Built with Next.js frontend and Django REST API backend.
- Tech: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Django, DRF, PostgreSQL, Stripe, Tailwind CSS, AWS
- URL: https://www.baxzar.com

### Portfolio Website
Modern portfolio site built with Next.js 16 and React Query. Demonstrates advanced Next.js patterns including Server Components, React Query for data fetching, and a Perry the Platypus-inspired color scheme.
- Tech: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, React Query, Tailwind CSS 4, Shadcn/UI
- URL: https://lunyco.com

### r/Jure Sanguinis
Professional legal services platform for Italian citizenship by descent. Features client management, document tracking, and automated workflow tracking.
- Tech: Next.js, TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS, Vercel
- URL: https://www.rjuresanguinis.com/

### Subsidies.io
AI-powered platform for discovering government subsidies and grants. Uses intelligent matching algorithms to help businesses and individuals find relevant funding opportunities.
- Tech: Next.js, TypeScript, AI/ML, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, OpenAI
- URL: https://www.subsidies.io/

## All Projects

### DevPack Group
Software development agency website showcasing services and portfolio. Features modern design, service offerings, portfolio showcases, and client testimonials.
- Tech: Next.js, TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Vercel
- URL: https://devpackgroup.com/

### Enlaces Automotrices
Automotive parts and services B2B platform connecting suppliers with mechanics and repair shops. Features inventory management, order processing, and logistics coordination.
- Tech: Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, AWS
- URL: https://www.enlacesautomotrices.com/
